name: Auto Lines
author: roquerodrigo
description:
Automates transit line building.

- **Extend** — pick a line and each end is walked outward along its corridor, auto-including single continuations until a bifurcation (where you choose the branch) or a dead end.
- **New line** — pick a group of connected stations that have no line and the mod previews the corridor it would build, then creates it.

Both come with terminus crossovers, so trains reverse cleanly, and demand-based trains on 5 / 10 / 15-minute headways computed from the line's round-trip time.
